name: Whole Wheat Popcorn Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups Whole Wheat Flour (plus to make a round ball)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pop popcorn using an Air Popper.
2. Mill the popped corn in a Vitamix, Cuisenart, or good blender until you have 4 cups of fluffy popcorn flour from 8 cups of popped popcorn.
3. Combine ingredients in the bread pan in the order listed.
4. Bake at high temperature for rapid rise. The resulting loaf is tall and light!
